General.Name: Eduform'action S.A.
General.Description: Eduform'action Société Anonyme provides education and training services. It offers training programs in the fields of digital and technology, health and services, and impact and energy. The company was formerly known as MonFinancier SAS. Eduform'action Société Anonyme was incorporated in 2022 and is based in Boulogne-Billancourt, France.
